name: Qwen Block
description: Qwen-style transformer block: RMSNorm -> GQA with RoPE -> Residual -> RMSNorm -> SwiGLU -> Residual
code:
# === Qwen Block {{_id}} (GQA) ===
_qb{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_qb{{_id}}_qh = {{n_q_heads}}
_qb{{_id}}_kvh = {{n_kv_heads}}
_qb{{_id}}_dk = _qb{{_id}}_d // _qb{{_id}}_qh
_qb{{_id}}_g = _qb{{_id}}_qh // _qb{{_id}}_kvh
_qb{{_id}}_hd = {{hidden_dim}}
# -- Attention Norm --
_qb{{_id}}_an = np.ones(_qb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_xn = {{input}} * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean({{input}} ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _qb{{_id}}_an
# -- GQA --
_qb{{_id}}_wq = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_d, _qb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_wk = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_kvh * _qb{{_id}}_dk, _qb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_wv = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_kvh * _qb{{_id}}_dk, _qb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_wo = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_d, _qb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_bq = np.zeros(_qb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_bk = np.zeros(_qb{{_id}}_kvh * _qb{{_id}}_dk, dtype=np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_bv = np.zeros(_qb{{_id}}_kvh * _qb{{_id}}_dk, dtype=np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_bs, _qb{{_id}}_sl, _ = _qb{{_id}}_xn.shape
_qb{{_id}}_q = (np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_xn, _qb{{_id}}_wq.T) + _qb{{_id}}_bq).reshape(_qb{{_id}}_bs, _qb{{_id}}_sl, _qb{{_id}}_qh, _qb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_qb{{_id}}_k = (np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_xn, _qb{{_id}}_wk.T) + _qb{{_id}}_bk).reshape(_qb{{_id}}_bs, _qb{{_id}}_sl, _qb{{_id}}_kvh, _qb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_qb{{_id}}_v = (np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_xn, _qb{{_id}}_wv.T) + _qb{{_id}}_bv).reshape(_qb{{_id}}_bs, _qb{{_id}}_sl, _qb{{_id}}_kvh, _qb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_qb{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _qb{{_id}}_dk, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _qb{{_id}}_dk))
_qb{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_qb{{_id}}_sl, dtype=np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_ang = np.outer(_qb{{_id}}_pos, _qb{{_id}}_freqs)
_qb{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_qb{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_qb{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_qr = np.zeros_like(_qb{{_id}}_q)
_qb{{_id}}_qr[..., 0::2] = _qb{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _qb{{_id}}_cos - _qb{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _qb{{_id}}_sin
_qb{{_id}}_qr[..., 1::2] = _qb{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _qb{{_id}}_sin + _qb{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _qb{{_id}}_cos
_qb{{_id}}_kr2 = np.zeros_like(_qb{{_id}}_k)
_qb{{_id}}_kr2[..., 0::2] = _qb{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _qb{{_id}}_cos - _qb{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _qb{{_id}}_sin
_qb{{_id}}_kr2[..., 1::2] = _qb{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _qb{{_id}}_sin + _qb{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _qb{{_id}}_cos
_qb{{_id}}_kr = np.repeat(_qb{{_id}}_kr2, _qb{{_id}}_g, axis=1)
_qb{{_id}}_vr = np.repeat(_qb{{_id}}_v, _qb{{_id}}_g, axis=1)
_qb{{_id}}_sc = np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_qr, _qb{{_id}}_kr.transpose(0, 1, 3, 2)) / np.sqrt(_qb{{_id}}_dk)
if {{mask}} is not None:
    _qb{{_id}}_sc = np.where({{mask}} == 0, -1e9, _qb{{_id}}_sc)
_qb{{_id}}_ex = np.exp(_qb{{_id}}_sc - np.max(_qb{{_id}}_sc, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_qb{{_id}}_aw = _qb{{_id}}_ex / np.sum(_qb{{_id}}_ex, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_qb{{_id}}_attn = np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_aw, _qb{{_id}}_vr)
_qb{{_id}}_attn_out = np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_attn.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(_qb{{_id}}_bs, _qb{{_id}}_sl, _qb{{_id}}_d), _qb{{_id}}_wo.T)
# -- Residual 1 --
_qb{{_id}}_r1 = {{input}} + _qb{{_id}}_attn_out
# -- FFN Norm --
_qb{{_id}}_fn = np.ones(_qb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_qb{{_id}}_r1n = _qb{{_id}}_r1 * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean(_qb{{_id}}_r1 ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _qb{{_id}}_fn
# -- SwiGLU FFN --
_qb{{_id}}_wg = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_hd, _qb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_wu = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_hd, _qb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_wd = np.random.randn(_qb{{_id}}_d, _qb{{_id}}_hd).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_qb{{_id}}_gate = np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_r1n, _qb{{_id}}_wg.T)
_qb{{_id}}_up = np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_r1n, _qb{{_id}}_wu.T)
_qb{{_id}}_silu = _qb{{_id}}_gate * (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_qb{{_id}}_gate)))
_qb{{_id}}_ffn = np.matmul(_qb{{_id}}_silu * _qb{{_id}}_up, _qb{{_id}}_wd.T)
# -- Residual 2 --
{{output}} = _qb{{_id}}_r1 + _qb{{_id}}_ffn
